Patch Set 7: Code-Review+1

I actually hit this exact LASSERT() when doing some stress testing with osd-wbcfs and kefalnd. The workload was just bulk read/write driven by fio - so nothing exotic. I assumed something was wrong with osd-wbcfs and commented out the LASSERT(). I guess the LASSERT() is just wrong. Huh.

commit.subject: LU-16771 llite: statfs on regular files is OK
commit.message:
LU-16771 llite: statfs on regular files is OK

It shouldn't be considered a bug to statfs() a regular file.
There doesn't appear to be anything directory-specific in
ll_statfs_project() that would warrant this LASSERT(), and
it can be trivially triggered from userspace.

Fixes: 2354f2f040 ("LU-16771 llite: cache statfs data for projects")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
